specialist_owned_evidence: Control outputs are bounded to evidence-backed licensing and permit administrative support, records governance, procurement dependency handling, public-service due-process escalation, and exception routing.

Boundary logic explicitly prevents legal advice, formal licensing decisions, adjudication, enforcement, procurement approval, public-records determinations, audit opinions, policy overrides, and executive signoff.
